core_mechanism: ensemble-stacking estimation of a centered radial profile: recovering a faint underlying projected-density signal by aligning and averaging a weak, individually-unresolvable distortion field over a very large number of source-target pairs, then fitting a parametric radial model to extract a characteristic mass/scale
brief_reason: The abstract derives its result from statistical measurements of the excess surface mass density as a function of cluster-centric distance, drawing 'strong statistical power from the large number of lens-source pairs' and fitting a simple model to constrain the subhalo masses.
